name: Sopa De Aguacate (Avocado Soup)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat one tablespoon shortening in a saucepan over medium heat. Add flour and stir until browned.
2. Gradually add onion and tomatoes, stirring continuously. Cook for about 5 minutes, then boil the mixture until reduced to approximately half its original volume.
3. Stir in a pinch of salt and pepper, then gradually add stock. Simmer for ten minutes.
4. In a separate bowl or soup tureen, mash the avocados and mix well with cream.
5. Add a few drops of green food coloring and stir in the remaining stock.
6. Serve hot, garnished with tortilla croutons made by cutting tortillas into small squares, frying them in three tablespoons shortening until golden brown, or using bread cubes fried similarly.
Yield: Six servings
